evals.prompt: I'm getting a bunch of customer calls through our LiveKit agent and I want to automatically figure out which ones are sales vs support vs billing so we can route them to the right team
evals.expected_output: Routes to /ai-sorting with a crafted prompt mentioning LiveKit transcripts, the three categories, and call classification

assertions.name: mentions_transcripts
assertions.description: The crafted prompt mentions transcripts or call data as the input format

assertions.name: includes_categories
assertions.description: The crafted prompt includes the user's categories (sales, support, billing)

assertions.name: generates_runnable_prompt
assertions.description: Provides a /ai-sorting <prompt> that could be copy-pasted and run

evals.prompt: my AI keeps giving different answers every time I ask the same question and sometimes it just makes stuff up
evals.expected_output: Routes to /ai-making-consistent as primary (the inconsistency is the stated problem), may mention /ai-stopping-hallucinations as a follow-up for the fabrication issue

assertions.name: addresses_both_problems
assertions.description: Acknowledges both issues (inconsistency AND hallucination) rather than ignoring one

assertions.name: suggests_sequence_if_two_skills
assertions.description: If recommending two skills, presents them in a logical order

assertions.name: generates_runnable_prompt
assertions.description: Provides a runnable /ai-<skill> <prompt> that could be copy-pasted

evals.prompt: I want to build a customer support system that can answer questions from our help docs, but also route complex issues to a human
evals.expected_output: Recommends a sequence: /ai-searching-docs for the Q&A-over-docs part, then possibly /ai-sorting or /ai-building-chatbots for the routing/escalation part

assertions.name: routes_to_searching_docs
assertions.description: Recommends /ai-searching-docs as one of the skills (the core Q&A-over-docs need)

assertions.name: addresses_escalation
assertions.description: Addresses the human escalation/routing requirement, not just the Q&A part

assertions.name: recommends_sequence
assertions.description: Recognizes this spans multiple skills and recommends a sequence rather than a single skill

assertions.name: generates_runnable_prompt
assertions.description: Provides a runnable /ai-<skill> <prompt> for the first step
